data.title: The whales who had previously shorted BTC, ETH, and SOL have made a profit of $2.17 million on BTC and $1.77 million on SOL
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale who previously shorted BTC, ETH and SOL successfully turned losses into profits in the market correction. He has currently made a profit of $2.17 million on BTC and $1.77 million on SOL, but still lost $141,000 on ETH. The latest data shows that the whale has begun to gradually close SOL short positions to lock in profits.

data.title: China and U.S. Agree to Establish Trade Consultation Mechanism
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Chinese Ministry of Commerce held a routine press conference today, where a spokesperson addressed questions regarding the China-U.S. trade consultation mechanism. The spokesperson, He Yongqian, stated that China remains open to resolving trade concerns through dialogue and communication. Following the consensus reached during the China-U.S. talks in Geneva, both parties have agreed to establish a trade consultation mechanism to maintain communication on their respective trade concerns. China will release relevant information in due course.

data.title: Smart Chain Trading Platform TrendX Now Opens Core Trading Functions
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: TrendX, a new generation of smart on-chain trading platform, has now opened core trading functions, integrating real-time market monitoring, lightning-level trading execution and intelligent asset management to help users quickly lock in trading opportunities.
TrendX has integrated core modules such as smart DEX trading, on-chain data analysis, KOL dynamic insights, smart money signals, and custom strategy triggers. TrendX is committed to lowering the threshold for on-chain transactions, improving efficiency and security, allowing users to easily get started and deeply explore the Web3 world.

data.title: Actress Hwang Jung-eum Faces Charges Over Misuse of Company Funds for Cryptocurrency Investment
data.description:
According to PANews, South Korean actress Hwang Jung-eum has been charged with misappropriating funds from her talent agency, which she controls, to invest in cryptocurrency. The Jeju District Court held the first public hearing on May 15, 2025, regarding the case.

The indictment reveals that between early 2022 and December of the same year, Hwang diverted a total of 4.34 billion Korean won from the company, with 4.2 billion won allocated to cryptocurrency investments.

Hwang's legal representative acknowledged the charges, stating that the investments were made with the intention of developing the company, emphasizing that the profits would ultimately benefit Hwang. Currently, Hwang is working to repay some of the losses by selling cryptocurrency and planning to sell real estate. The court has accepted the request to proceed with the compensation-related procedures.

data.title: A whale deposited $5.59 million in ENA into Binance, which may result in a loss of $3.21 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale unlocked and deposited 14.83 million ENA worth $5.59 million into Binance. Previously, the whale withdrew 22.63 million ENA (worth $11.84 million) from Binance and Bybit, and obtained 577,000 ENA through staking. However, even so, the whale still faces a loss of $3.21 million. Currently, the whale still holds 3 million ENA, worth about $1.12 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidation on Major Exchanges
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass indicates that if Bitcoin falls below $101,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of long positions on major centralized exchanges (CEX) will reach $996 million. Conversely, if Bitcoin surpasses $103,000, the cumulative liquidation intensity of short positions on these exchanges will amount to $247 million.

BlockBeats notes that the liquidation chart does not precisely display the number of contracts pending liquidation or the exact value of contracts being liquidated. Instead, the chart's bars represent the relative importance of each liquidation cluster compared to nearby clusters, indicating intensity.

Therefore, the chart illustrates the extent to which the target price reaching a certain level will be affected. A higher "liquidation bar" suggests that once the price reaches that level, there will be a stronger reaction due to a wave of liquidity.
